question: If your engine runs a pump used during delivery of a compressed gas, should you turn off the engine before or after unhooking hoses after delivery>
canonical_answer: Turn it off after product transfer, before you unhook the hose

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Turn it off after product transfer, before you unhook the hose
